'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=RMFOto7pG3938.MDl88WFWnHSEg0r5mZHBNB9vvCEWU-1773610318-1.0.1.1-TjmJACN3hEnWNvgyEW8lK8hzKNSj.4hzsd_RKK7m7F4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
